sections.notes: This course includes a mandatory four-day field trip to Montreal. Through visits to diverse neighbourhoods and institutions, as well as meetings with professors, community organizations, and policy makers, students will examine urban form, governance, policy, and community-based planning in practice. The field trip typically takes place from Thursday to Sunday around the mid-term period, and participation is required for successful completion of the course.
